meaning: n.公爵领地,直辖领地,公国
examples: Prince Charles leads an expensive life and the Duchy of Cornwall is there to fund it.
Almost every resident is a tenant of the duchy, which has its regional office in the village.
"The position of tenants is unaffected by the stance they may take as individuals," said a spokeswoman for the duchy.
The Duchy is working on the development with Morrish Builders, CG Fry and Son, and Wainhomes.
Waitrose's managing director Mark Price said millions will be invested into developing the Duchy brand.
